# Rent Comps Documentation

Overview of how rent comp data collection and analysis works.

## Data Collection

Rent data is collected from public listing sources on a regular schedule.
Each collection run captures face rent, effective rent, and concession details
for subject properties and their nearby comparables.

## Properties

Properties are the core entity. A subject property is one you own or manage.
Comp properties are nearby comparables used to benchmark your rents against
the local market. Each property has unit types with beds, baths, and square footage.

## Rent Analysis

Rent analysis compares subject property pricing to comp averages.
Key metrics include rent per square foot, concession-adjusted effective rent,
and vacancy-weighted averages. Reports can be generated per property or portfolio-wide.

## Market Reports

Market reports aggregate rent comp data across a geographic area.
They show trends in asking rents, occupancy rates, and concession activity
over configurable time periods.
